LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO ENTER A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO A STIPULATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. WELLS FARGO IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT AHMAD I AHMAD IN THE AMOUNT OF $8,117,40, INCLUSIVE OF COSTS. COUNSEL FOR WELLS FARGO TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Plaintiff To Enter A Judgment Pursuant To A Stipulation (Motions)
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephen Sayad, Esq. 415-410-1721 Specially appearing for Plaintiff WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.'s Motion Of Plaintiff To Enter A Judgment Pursuant To A Stipulation.

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to enter a judgment pursuant to a stipulation is granted. No opposition filed. Wells Fargo is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Ahmad I Ahmad in the amount of $8,117,40, inclusive of costs.

Counsel for Wells Fargo to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the ruling and a proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)
